content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit framework imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5 but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or feature (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:1-13; description.txt makes no mention of HomeKit/smart home).

Pierre: Apple flags apps that import HomeKit without a legitimate home-automation purpose, since HMHomeManager triggers a permission prompt and can be seen as misuse of a sensitive entitlement. Here the app is purely a wallpaper gallery — there's no home, accessory, or automation UI anywhere, so this import looks vestigial or accidental (maybe copy-pasted boilerplate). Remove the HomeKit import/entitlement if it's unused, or add genuine HomeKit functionality if it's actually needed.
